_comment: Per-project completion-oracle CLASS overrides (cockpit-roadmap-redesign plan, Task 1, architecture-review amendment A4). COPY this file to `completion-oracle.json` (same dir, gitignored) to override a project's class on this machine. Keys are the SAME project tags used in projects.json/projects.example.json; values are exactly one of "deploy-oracle" (a merged item is complete only once a deploy signal strictly newer than the merge is supplied) | "merged-is-deployed" (this project's own install mechanism makes merged == deployed) | "no-signal" (no deploy-confirmation mechanism exists — a merged item renders the distinct 'merged - deploy unverified' state, OUTSIDE Complete, never silently complete). Any project key NOT listed here, and not one of the checked-in defaults in server/completion-oracle.js (today: this repo's own 'neural-lace' alias -> merged-is-deployed), defaults to "no-signal" - the safe default.
